name: GroypFi Groypad
description: Deploy, trade, and manage tokens on Groypad bonding curves on TON.

tools.name: groypad_deploy
tools.description: Deploy a new memecoin with metadata and an initial buy.

tools.name: groypad_list_tokens
tools.description: List active Groypad tokens with market cap and progress.

tools.name: groypad_token_info
tools.description: Get on-chain bonding curve data for a Groypad token.

tools.name: groypad_get_quote
tools.description: Preview buy/sell quote without executing a trade.

tools.name: groypad_buy
tools.description: Buy tokens on the Groypad bonding curve.

tools.name: groypad_sell
tools.description: Sell tokens back to the Groypad bonding curve.

SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon key for GroypFi endpoints

TONCENTER_API_KEY.description: Optional TonCenter API key for higher rate limits
